title: blechnum geniculatum
intro: Blechnum geniculatum, also known as the bent-fern or bent fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum geniculatum include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as hypertension and arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
